rows.label: qev010501_MSG0001
rows.name:
Monica... You've got to understand...
Our top priority as BLADEs is to
come back alive, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010501_MSG0002
rows.name:
As the one in charge of this team,
I have to make the choice with
the least amount of risk...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010501_MSG0003
rows.name:
A comrade's life is more important than
risk! If you're telling me you won't go...
I'll go search for Connor on my own.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010501_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Don't be unreasonable, you stubborn
idiot... Listen to me for a second...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010501_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Hm, you... If you're hanging
around here... are you a BLADE?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010501_MSG0006
rows.name:
Tell me, what do you think? Should we go
rescue one of our comrades right now, even
if it puts the entire team at risk?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010501_MSG0007
rows.name:
Or should we abandon our comrade,
retreat to NLA, and wait for backup
before heading out to search?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010501_JNK0010
rows.name: Rescue

rows.label: qev010501_SEL0011
rows.name: Say that they must go search immediately.

rows.label: qev010501_JNK0020
rows.name: Retreat

rows.label: qev010501_SEL0021
rows.name: Say that they should secure their safety first.

rows.label: qev010501_MSG0008
rows.name:
You're a good person! Exactly, if we waste
time going back to NLA, he won't survive
something he could've been saved from![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010501_MSG0009
rows.name:
But if we end up missing
too, Connor will also...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010501_MSG0010
rows.name:
You've got the personality of a team leader.
That's right, that's what the responsibility
of holding lives in your hands means.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010501_MSG0011
rows.name:
What responsibility... That's ridiculous!
Whatever, I'm going to save Connor![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010501_MSG0012
rows.name: Phew... We're right back to square one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010501_MSG0013
rows.name:
That's it... Hey, could you go to
Sickle Rock Rise up north and see
if you can find a guy named Connor?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010501_MSG0014
rows.name:
He's a member of our team. He went out
to investigate and hasn't come back,
and we can't get him on the comms...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010501_MSG0015
rows.name:
Thank you. Ideally, we should
be the ones to go, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010501_MSG0016
rows.name:
In this situation, it could lead
to a double disaster. ...Hence
the argument you just saw.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010501_MSG0017
rows.name:
I'm sorry you had to see that
embarrassing display. But
you're really saving us here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010501_MSG0018
rows.name:
Once we know his location, we'll
head out to rescue him fully
prepared... So please, find Connor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010501_MSG0020
rows.name:
Connor went to investigate
Sickle Rock Rise up north.
Try searching around there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010501_MSG0019
rows.name:
While you're out searching, we'll
get ready for the rescue op.
...We appreciate your help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010501_MSG0021
rows.name:
We struggled taking down a Copper Vasalt
and ended up battered and bruised.[ST:wait ]
